Move the handling of data.special_allowance before the first exclusive split on data.state. Concretely: remove the existing exclusive block after Apply Account Policy that contains Accept Empty Initial Balance / Accept Initial Deposit; insert an exclusive block immediately after Customer Request Arrives with branch cond: data.special_allowance -> Accept Empty Initial Balance and branch cond: not(data.special_allowance) -> empty; then insert a later exclusive after Apply Account Policy only for the non-special case, with cond: not(data.special_allowance) -> Accept Initial Deposit and cond: data.special_allowance -> empty. This ensures that whenever data.special_allowance is true after Customer Request Arrives, Accept Empty Initial Balance eventually occurs before any later exclusive branch can bypass it. Keep Initiate Account unchanged.

Add a guarded Accept Empty Initial Balance inside every branch of the existing data.state exclusive. Concretely: in the data.state == "new" branch, after Identity Check, add an exclusive with cond: data.special_allowance -> Accept Empty Initial Balance and cond: not(data.special_allowance) -> empty; in the data.state == "existing" branch, after Login for Existing Customer, add the same guarded exclusive; in the default state branch, add the same guarded exclusive. Then replace the later data.special_allowance branch after Apply Account Policy with an empty branch, while keeping the not(data.special_allowance) branch with Accept Initial Deposit. This preserves the state-dependent behavior while ensuring that all state branches eventually execute Accept Empty Initial Balance when data.special_allowance is true. Keep Initiate Account unchanged.

If duplicate execution is acceptable as a partial but very localized mitigation, insert a new guarded exclusive immediately after Customer Request Arrives with cond: data.special_allowance -> Accept Empty Initial Balance and cond: not(data.special_allowance) -> empty, and leave the rest of the process unchanged. This guarantees early satisfaction of the condition_eventually_follows requirement, although cases with data.special_allowance may execute Accept Empty Initial Balance again later in the existing balance-handling exclusive. Initiate Account remains unchanged.
